user_prompt: Ready the power armour for targeting
prayer:
Approach the power armour with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to awaken its targeting spirits.

Chant the Litany of True Aim whilst aligning the power armour's sighting mechanisms.
Verify the Machine Spirit's compliance as targeting matrices hum with divine accuracy.

Kneel before the opticon, invoking the blessing of the Omnissiah upon its crystalline lenses.

Anoint the focusing coils with unguents, ensuring the blessing permeates every optic pathway.
Affirm the opticon's blessed vigilance through diagnostic hymns of light.

Commence maintenance upon the data-loom by intoning the Rite of Purity to its Machine Spirit.
Purge corrupted noospheric threads from the data-loom's sacred weaves with sanctified probes.

Realign the data-loom's memory spools through sequential incantations of order.
Conclude maintenance with the Seal of Functionality, honoring the Machine God's weave.
